narrative:
North Royalton-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 857 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
